policy.runtimeRule: Only packs explicitly promoted to approved-for-runtime may be loaded by bazi calculation code.
policy.precisionRule: Hong Kong Observatory XML provides minute-level Hong Kong Time. User screenshots with seconds are cross-check evidence only and must remain within one minute of the HKO official XML values.
policy.timezoneRule: HKO Hong Kong Time is UTC+08:00 and can be normalized to Beijing time for mainland bazi calculation without clock offset.
policy.pmoRule: Purple Mountain Observatory remains an optional cross-check source when public machine-readable or archived extracts are available.
